Maternal, Child, and Adolescent Health Advisory Board
Maternal, Child, and Adolescent Health Advisory Board
General Details
‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚Äč‚ÄčPurpose
The Maternal, Child, and Adolescent Health (MCAH) 
Advisory Board reviews the health needs of women, children, and adolescents in 
Sacramento County and helps to develop recommendations and policies to meet 
those needs. The MCAH Advisory Board reports directly to the Sacramento County 
Board of Supervisors. The MCAH Advisory Board meets five times throughout the 
year during the months of January, March, May, September, and November. The 
meetings are open to the public.
How to Join
If you are interested in attending a meeting of the 
MCAH Advisory Board, please call our office in advance so we can¬†make adequate 
arrangements.
A list of available MCAH¬†Advisory Board seats and an application can be 
found at the
Sacramento County Boards and Commissions
webpage.
If 
you would like additional information about the MCAH Advisory Board, membership 
on this Board, or meetings times and locations, please see contact below.
